meaning: n.内装豆子的小布袋(小孩用作玩具)
examples: The beanbag wheels absorb shock far better than other types of wheels.
Engineering professors at McGill University have constructed a new type of wheel, designed for the moon but inspired by the humble beanbag chair.
Ty Warner was criticized when he began to market his small-sized, understuffed beanbag animals.
Even if you did, you still might be wary of leaning too far back into its beanbag-like embrace.
